better-ux.midnightconfig.title: BetterUI Settings
better-ux.midnightconfig.closeOnRightCli: Close an open screen by just right-clicking anywhere.
better-ux.midnightconfig.closeScreenButt: Configures which mouse button closes an open screen when you click outside it.
better-ux.midnightconfig.reverseHotbarSc: Reverses the mouse-wheel scrolling direction of the inventory hotbar.
better-ux.midnightconfig.focusSearchFiel: Automatically focus the search field when opening a dialog with a recipe book.
